Hearing On Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jul-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christopher J. Keane, Esq. appeared with Janet Hipolito, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Leo James H. Ong, who was also present at today's hearing.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $7,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Medical Expenses - $1,419.75.
Costs - $580.25.

A net balance of $5,000.00 shall be deposited into a blocked account with a financial institution to be determined. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit the proposed orders to approve the compromise of a disputed claim of a minor, and to deposit money into a blocked account, no later than Friday, July 17, 2009.
